description: The Vagos Motorcycle Club is a one percenter outlaw motorcycle club formed in the 1960s in San Bernardino, California. With approximately 5,000 members across 200 chapters, it operates primarily in the Western United States, Mexico, and Europe. The club's insignia features Loki, the Norse god of mischief, riding a motorcycle. It is considered one of the largest and most powerful one-percenter biker gangs in the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: Chapters in Europe are in Germany (2 Chapters, South-West and Steel Legion), Ireland, France, Belgium (2 Chapters Liege and Mons)
country_links.context: The Vagos have two chapters in Belgium.

country_links.evidence_quote: In South America there are Chapters in Brazil, Chile, Costa Rica and Ecuador.
country_links.context: The Vagos have chapters in Brazil.
